productDisplayName: Lotto Men T-Effect III White Blue Shoe
description: Designed for the hardcore tennis buff, the lotto T-Effect III is a great tennis shoe designed to ensure maximum performance on the court. Upper Synthetic and perforated upper for extended durability and to keep the feet fresh and dry all day Synthetic lace-up system for snug Fit for durability Cushioned collar and padded tongue for enhanced grip and comfort Extended rubber outsole embedded into the toe box for superior shock absorption Padded sockliner for snug fit and impact protection Midsole EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel and enhanced shock absorption, providing Great comfort Arched footbed for ergonomic fit Outsole Carbon rubber outsole in multi-directional pattern for enhanced grip on any terrain Dedicated rubber lugs with extra patch of rubber around the periphery of the heel for superior traction Scoop at the heel counter for added cushioning and impact protection Wash careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
